    Expand All @@ -59,7 +60,10 @@ describe('ReactFresh', () => {

    ReactFreshRuntime.register(OuterV1, 'Outer');

    await act(() => {
    root.render(<OuterV1 />);

    const el = container.firstChild;
    const pathEl = el.querySelector('path');
    expect(el.style.color).toBe('blue');
